nodes.label: User message
nodes.note: messagesFromUserInput are **normalized** and **enter the engine**; **queryLoop** is invoked with the conversation so far.

nodes.label: Stream model response
nodes.note: **callModel streams** the assistant turn. **tool_use blocks** are **accumulated** into toolUseBlocks as they arrive (stop_reason='tool_use' is treated as **unreliable**).

nodes.label: Any tool_use blocks?
nodes.note: After the stream completes, **branch** on whether the assistant **emitted tool calls**. **No tool calls → the turn ends**.

nodes.label: runTools(batch)
nodes.note: **runTools** receives the **whole batch** of tool_use blocks plus **canUseTool** and the tool context, and **drives execution**.

nodes.label: canUseTool gate
nodes.note: **canUseTool** is wrapped to **record permission denials**. Depending on the permission mode it may **auto-allow** or **prompt the user**; a **denial becomes an error tool_result** fed back to the model.

nodes.label: Execute tool
nodes.note: The **streaming executor** runs the **allowed tool** and **yields a tool_result**. The executor **checks the abort signal** so an interrupt produces synthetic results rather than orphaned tool_use blocks.

nodes.label: end_turn
nodes.note: With **no tool calls** to run, the **while(true) loop completes** and **queryLoop returns** a terminal value for this turn.

scenarios.title: Model answers with **no tools**
scenarios.note: The assistant stream ends with **end_turn** and **no tool_use blocks**, so the loop **exits after a single model call**.

scenarios.title: User asks to **edit a file**
scenarios.note: Model **requests an edit tool**, **canUseTool allows it** (or the user approves), the **edit runs**, the tool_result feeds back, and the **model finishes**.

scenarios.title: User **denies a tool call**
scenarios.note: **canUseTool records a denial**; an **error tool_result** is fed back to the model, which then **completes the turn** without the tool's effect.

scenarios.title: Model issues **several tool calls** in one turn
scenarios.note: A single assistant turn emits **multiple tool_use blocks**; **runTools drives them as a batch**, each **gated by canUseTool**, before the combined tool_results return to the model.
